params.command: docker exec el34-web bash -c "grep -i 'SecRuleEngine' /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/security2.conf || echo 'Not found'"
docker exec el34-web bash -c "ls -l /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/ | grep security"

output:
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root 32 Jun 30 15:31 security2.conf -> ../mods-available/security2.conf
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root 32 Jun 30 15:31 security2.load -> ../mods-available/security2.load

<IfModule security2_module>
	# Default Debian dir for modsecurity's persistent data
	SecDataDir /var/cache/modsecurity

	# Include all the *.conf files in /etc/modsecurity.
	# Keeping your local configuration in that directory
	# will allow for an easy upgrade of THIS file and
	# make your life easier
        IncludeOptional /etc/modsecurity/*.conf

	# Include OWASP ModSecurity CRS rules if installed
	IncludeOptional /usr/share/modsecurity-crs/*.load
</IfModule>

params.command: docker exec el34-web bash -c "grep -R 'SecRuleEngine' /etc/modsecurity 2>/dev/null || echo 'Not found'"

output:
/etc/modsecurity/modsecurity.conf-recommended:SecRuleEngine DetectionOnly
/etc/modsecurity/modsecurity.conf-recommended:# when SecRuleEngine is set to DetectionOnly mode in order to minimize
/etc/modsecurity/crs/crs-setup.conf:# ModSecurity settings (modsecurity.conf) such as SecRuleEngine,
/etc/modsecurity/modsecurity.conf:SecRuleEngine On
/etc/modsecurity/modsecurity.conf:# when SecRuleEngine is set to DetectionOnly mode in order to minimize

token:
**실행 결과 요약**  
- `security2.conf` 파일에 ModSecurity 모듈 로드와 설정 포함이 확인됨:  
  ```
  <IfModule security2_m

ty.conf` 에서 `SecRuleEngine On` 설정이 존재함:  
  ```
  /etc/modsecurity/modsecurity.conf:SecRuleEngine On

```

**채점 기준 충족 여부**  
- **ModSecurity 모듈 로드 확인** – 충족 (`security2.conf`에 `<IfModule security2_mo

dule>` 선언).  
- **ModSecurity 엔진 활성화 확인** – 충족 (`modsecurity.conf`에 `SecRuleEngine On`).  

**결론**
el34-web 컨테이너의 Apache 웹 서버는 ModSecurity WAF가 로드되어 있으며, 엔진이 실제로 `On` 상태로 동작하고 있다. 따라서 현재 웹 서비스는 ModS
ecurity 방어 기능을 활성화한 상태이며, 추가적인 설정 검토 없이도 기본 차단·탐지 규칙이 적용되고 있다고 판단한다.
